job_description:
Responsibilities: Position: Tele Sales Executive (Part-Time)
Company: Tutoriaa.com
Location: Mirpur DOHS, Dhaka
Job Type: Part-Time (In-office)

Tutoriaa.com is looking for dynamic, talkative, and target-driven individuals to join our growing team as Part-Time Tele Sales Executives. If you love connecting with people and have a spark for sales, this is the perfect opportunity for you.

Working Hours
4:00 PM – 10:00 PM (Part-Time)

Compensation & Benefits
- Basic Salary: 6,000 BDT
- Performance Commission: 2,000 – 6,000 BDT (Based on sales targets)

Educational Requirements
- Minimum HSC completed
- Must be a current undergraduate student

Candidate Requirements
- Excellent verbal communication skills
- Enthusiastic and passionate about helping and engaging with people
- High-energy, confident, and results-oriented
- Ability to negotiate and persuade effectively

Key Responsibilities
- Make outbound calls to potential leads to promote Tutoriaa.com services
- Understand customer needs and provide suitable solutions
- Maintain a positive and energetic attitude to ensure high conversion rates
- Achieve daily and monthly sales targets set by management

Additional Notes
- Only candidates residing in Mirpur will be considered.

Position: Tele Sales Executive (Part-Time) Company: Tutoriaa.com Location: Mirpur DOHS, Dhaka Job Type: Part-Time (In-office) Tutoriaa.com is looking for dynamic, talkative, and target-driven individuals to join our growing team as Part-Time Tele Sales Executives . If you love connecting with people and have a spark for sales, this is the perfect opportunity for you.
